channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: J’ai roulé 1000 km en Alfa Romeo Junior Veloce pour savoir si on pouvait prendre du plaisir en voiture électrique : voici ce que j’en pense
item.description: La voiture électrique, aux yeux de beaucoup de passionnés, serait parfaitement incompatible avec toute forme de passion automobile. Reste à savoir ce qu'on met dans ce terme ; pour essayer d'en savoir plus, j'ai roulé 1 000 km au volant de l'Alfa Romeo Junior Veloce de 280 ch. De la piste aux chemins de campagne, voici comment ça s'est passé.

item.title: Nouvelle fuite chez Bouygues Telecom : vos données personnelles ont encore été volées
item.description: Bouygues Telecom s'est retrouvé dans le viseur d'un cybercriminel. Un pirate est parvenu à compromettre un outil interne de l'entreprise pour exfiltrer les données des abonnés.

item.title: Cricut’s $99 craft cutting machine helped me feel creative again
item.description: I've always been skeptical of products that claim to help you lead a more creative life. But one recently won me over. I've spent three weeks with the Cricut Joy 2, a smart cutting and drawing machine that made it easy for me to get back into making stickers, cards, bookmarks, and more. The small […]

item.title: Writers are fleeing the Substack Tax
item.description: Substack, the once buzzy newsletter platform, is losing a new swath of writers to rival platforms most people haven't heard of. Just last month, The Ankler, one of Substack's most popular publications, left for a platform that gives it more control over its site. Others who have departed Substack within the past year voiced similar […]

item.title: Hear me out: MagSafe has failed to reach its potential, but the foldable iPhone Ultra could revive it — here’s how
item.description: MagSafe isn’t as good as it could be, but the iPhone Ultra is a chance for Apple to put things right.

item.title: As a fitness editor, I thought I knew what I liked in a gym shoe — but after using the VivoBarefoot Motus Strength II for one month, I'm not sure I'm ever going back
item.description: It might look like a wetsuit boot, but it's comfortable, lightweight and flexible — I'm in love

item.title: I'm looking forward to using the new Philips Hue smart light sports sync feature during the World Cup — as long as it doesn't signal goals too early
item.description: Signify is giving its Philips Hue smart lights a special Sports Live feature for the duration of the World Cup 2026.

item.title: À moins de 300 €, ce pack Marshall avec une enceinte Acton III et un casque Major V est la meilleure offre audio du jour
item.description: Avis aux fans de la marque Marshall. Son-Vidéo propose actuellement un pack à 290 euros au lieu de 448 euros, contenant une enceinte Marshall Acton III au design iconique, ainsi qu'un casque Major V très endurant.

item.title: The hottest place for startups to strike a deal? The F1 paddock
item.description: F1 Grands Prix have emerged as a new place to see and be seen if you are a founder or investor.

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episode 8 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Daisy is fighting for her life... and for her truth to stay concealed in Gilead. But when does The Testaments episode 8 drop on Hulu and Disney+?
